message:
feat(oracle): add e-process anytime-valid invariant monitoring

Implement betting supermartingale (e-process) monitors for continuous oracle
invariant checking without type-I error inflation. This enables peeking at
invariants (task leaks, obligation leaks, quiescence) at any time during
test execution while maintaining statistical validity.

- Add eprocess.rs with EProcess, EProcessConfig, EProcessMonitor, EValue,
  and MonitorResult types
- Register module in oracle/mod.rs and re-export public types
- Update lab/mod.rs re-exports to include e-process types

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-    FinalizerViolation, LogLikelihoodContributions, LoserDrainOracle, LoserDrainViolation,
-    MailboxOracle, MailboxViolation, MailboxViolationKind, ObligationLeakOracle,
